retrieved_result: Definition of workaround \"workaroundnouna method of accomplishing something that is otherwise prevented due to a bug. Clicking \"\"Verify archive\"\" directly crashes the program, but you can use the keyboard shortcut as a workaround. See more words with the same meaning: computer slang. Last edited on Nov 11 2011. Submitted by
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses the definition of a workaround and computer slang, not Docker or how to set up Docker for beginners.
